name: Noah's Ark Brownies
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 350°F. Over low heat, melt butter and chocolate. Remove from heat. Stir in flour and vanilla. With a mixer, whip eggs and sugar until the mixture resembles a yellow ribbon. Blend in the chocolate mixture on slow speed. Stir in walnuts. Spread batter into a greased 9x13-inch and a greased 8x8-inch square pan. Bake for 35 minutes in the large pan: 30 minutes in the small pan. Makes 3 1/2 dozen.
